chunks.title: Call to Nations and Cosmic Judgment
chunks.reason: An introductory call to the nations describing the universal scope of Yahweh's wrath against all peoples.

chunks.title: Judgment on Edom and Bozrah
chunks.reason: A specific oracle detailing the divine sword's descent upon Edom and the total desolation of its land.

chunks.title: Desolation and Wild Creatures
chunks.reason: A catalog describing the transition of Edom into a wilderness inhabited by specific birds and beasts.

chunks.title: Divine Decree of Possession
chunks.reason: A concluding argument asserting that the creatures' permanent possession is sealed by Yahweh's command and lot.
